$comment: Template for manifests/overrides/<component>.json — the ONLY hand-edited files under manifests/. Every field is optional; the generator merges these last, on top of the extracted data. Copy, rename to the component's file name, delete this $comment, and fill in what you know. Schema-validated by `npm run manifests:check`.

do: A rule the component should be used like.
dont: A misuse to steer agents away from.

boundaries: A hard API/naming boundary, e.g. 'variant="outline" does not exist — secondary IS the outline.'

whenToUseInstead.when: the situation where the other component is the right pick
